title: Senior AI Solutions Engineer
company_focus: Process Intelligence and process mining SaaS platform
description:
We're Celonis, the global leader in Process Intelligence
technology and one of the world's fastest-growing SaaS
firms. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock
productivity by placing AI, data and intelligence at the
core of business processes - and for that, we need your
help. Care to join us?

The Team:

Celonis Services is a strategic organization focused on
optimizing our customers' business processes through
technical expertise. We integrate Consulting Services,
Academy, and Customer Support to deliver comprehensive
solutions. As thought leaders with deep product, technical,
and domain expertise, we specialize in implementing Celonis
to drive the adoption of process intelligence, ultimately
transforming and improving our customers' core business
operations. We achieve this by leveraging our best
practices, extensive delivery experience, award-winning
enablement programs, and robust support infrastructure.

The Role:

As an Senior AI Solutions Engineer (AI Deployment
Architect), you will work directly with customers to
understand their problems and design, deploy and scale
innovative AI solutions and automations using our Process
Intelligence platform. In a pre-sales and post sales
capacity you will work closely with other AI experts across
Product & Engineering and GTM to standardize these solutions
and bring them to our customer base at scale. We are ideally
looking for individuals with in-depth practical experience
in delivering solutions to our customers.

The work you’ll do:

- Pitch the Celonis AI value proposition and vision to
  customers and align our solutions with their AI strategy
- Prototype, develop, deploy and scale AI solutions tailored
  to customer needs, including both traditional machine
  learning and LLM-based solutions
- Identify and package scalable AI use cases across the
  Celonis platform, driving innovation and expanding our
  offerings
- Collect and share AI success stories with the whole
  organization and our customers
- Help define and lead execution on the roadmap for AI
  Lighthouse customers
- Closely collaborate with Product & Engineering and the
  Business Apps Teams to inform future product development
  based on customer feedback
- Train internal teams and help them position and deploy AI
  solutions
- Design and architecting end-to-end deployments that
  encompass AI, PI & Automation

The preferred qualifications you need:

- 5+ years experience in an analytical role with the objective
  to demonstrate or secure value through business data
  analysis, business process improvement and/or respective
  Software deployment. Ideally in a customer-facing role
  with a Consultancy or Business Software / SaaS Provider.
  Alternatively in an Inhouse role (e.g. Center of
  Excellence for Data Mining / Analytics / Intelligence)
  within an Enterprise.
- Proven experience developing AI solutions for enterprises,
  with a strong portfolio showcasing successful use cases
  solving real-world problems.
- Proficiency in programming languages such as Python
- Excellent problem-solving skills, analytical thinking, and
  attention to detail, with a track record of delivering
  high-quality solutions under tight deadlines.
- Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the
  ability to translate complex concepts into actionable
  insights for non-technical stakeholders.
- Experience in production level acceptance testing,
  delivering end-to-end solutions
- Strong visionary architectural mindset to develop scalable &
  easily extensible solutions
- Strong technical acumen to be able to choose the right AI
  solution / technology for the respective customer pain
  point
- Bachelor's degree or higher in Computer Science,
  Engineering, Mathematics, Econometrics or related field.

What Celonis Can Offer You:

- Pioneer Innovation: Work with the leading, award-winning
  process mining technology, shaping the future of business.
- Accelerate Your Growth: Benefit from clear career paths,
  internal mobility, a dedicated learning program, and
  mentorship opportunities.
- Receive Exceptional Benefits: Including generous PTO, hybrid
  working options, company equity (RSUs), comprehensive
  benefits, extensive parental leave, dedicated volunteer
  days, and much more. Interns and working students explore
  your benefits here.
- Prioritize Your Well-being: Access to resources such as gym
  subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.
- Connect and Belong: Find community and support through
  dedicated inclusion and belonging programs.
- Make Meaningful Impact: Be part of a company driven by
  strong values that guide everything we do: Live for
  Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth
  Is Our Future.
- Collaborate Globally: Join a dynamic, international team of
  talented individuals.
- Empowered Environment: Contribute your ideas in an open
  culture with autonomous teams.

About Us:

Celonis makes processes work for people, companies and the
planet. The Celonis Process Intelligence Platform uses
industry-leading process mining and AI technology and
augments it with business context to give customers a living
digital twin of their business operation. It’s system-
agnostic and without bias, and provides everyone with a
common language for understanding and improving businesses.
Celonis enables its customers to continuously realize
significant value across the top, bottom, and green line.
Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York
City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.

Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform
by watching this video.

Celonis Inclusion Statement:

At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and
that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are
made up of people who bring different perspectives to the
table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up
and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and
innovation happen.

Your Privacy:

Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your
application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’
Accessibility and Candidate Notices

By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree
to the storing and processing of your personal data by
Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the
Application and Hiring Process.

Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and
frauds. Learn more here.
responsibilities: Pitch Celonis AI value proposition and align solutions with customer AI strategies
Prototype, develop, deploy, and scale AI solutions including traditional ML and LLM-based solutions
Identify and package scalable AI use cases across the Celonis platform
Lead execution on AI roadmap for Lighthouse customers and share success stories
Collaborate with Product & Engineering teams to inform future product development based on customer feedback
Train internal teams and help them position and deploy AI solutions
Design and architect end-to-end deployments encompassing AI, Process Intelligence & Automation
use_cases: Business process optimization and improvement using AI and Process Intelligence
Traditional machine learning solutions for enterprise business problems
LLM-based solutions and automations for customer-specific use cases
AI-driven process mining and analysis to uncover business insights
Enterprise automation solutions leveraging AI and process intelligence
Digital twin creation of business operations using AI technology
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Forward Deployed Engineer role that hands-on
prototypes, develops, deploys, and scales AI solutions
including both traditional ML and LLM-based solutions
directly for customers. The role involves architecting end-
to-end AI deployments and selecting the right AI technology
for customer pain points, which is direct work on AI systems
rather than support infrastructure.
